mapper.insert: insert into ai_query_cursor ( id, cursor_id, conversation_id, user_id, user_code, tool_type, tool_name, module_code, module_name, keyword, start_time, end_time, status_filter, page, page_size, total, returned_count, query_summary, expires_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{cursorId}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{userCode}, #{toolType}, #{toolName}, #{moduleCode}, #{moduleName}, #{keyword}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusFilter}, #{page}, #{pageSize}, #{total}, #{returnedCount}, #{querySummary}, #{expiresAt}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 )
mapper.select: select id, cursor_id as cursorId, conversation_id as conversationId, user_id as userId, user_code as userCode, tool_type as toolType, tool_name as toolName, module_code as moduleCode, module_name as moduleName, keyword, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, status_filter as statusFilter, page, page_size as pageSize, total, returned_count as returnedCount, query_summary as querySummary, expires_at as expiresAt from ai_query_cursor where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 and expires_at > current_timestamp order by created_at desc, id desc limit 1

select id, cursor_id as cursorId, conversation_id as conversationId, user_id as userId, user_code as userCode, tool_type as toolType, tool_name as toolName, module_code as moduleCode, module_name as moduleName, keyword, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, status_filter as statusFilter, page, page_size as pageSize, total, returned_count as returnedCount, query_summary as querySummary, expires_at as expiresAt from ai_query_cursor where cursor_id = #{cursorId} and user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(user_code, '') = ifnull(#{userCode}, '') and deleted = 0 and expires_at > current_timestamp limit 1
